Angie Guevara of the DeVito Law Group (415.888.8215) for Nicole Dobarro;

CGC-24-617683, Queens SF, LLC v. Nicole Dobarro
CPF-25-518894, Nicole Dobarro v. Edward Kim.

Argued and the court adopts its tentative ruling as follows: Off calendar as moot. By companion order, the court has consolidated this action with Queens SF LLC v. Dobarro, CGC-24-617683, and Dobarro v. Kim, CPF-25-518894, and resolves the fee motion in the lead case, Queens SF LLC v. Dobarro, CGC-24-617683. Judge: Christine Van Aken, Clerk: E.
